meaning: n.失败,缺点,弱点,过失 prep.如果没有... adj.失败的
examples: I lived in fear of failing my final exams.
In a way, I suppose I'm frightened of failing.
Children are worried about failing in front of their peers.
Critics tend to see this "romantic image" as a failing of the ironic Austen, says Professor Todd.
The reality is that a failing marriage is not just the fault of one spouse, but two.
